title.ar: داخل مصنعنا في القليوب — ٥٠٬٠٠٠ متر مربع
title.fr: À l'intérieur de notre usine de Kalioub de 50 000 m²

excerpt.en: Two IQF freezers, four batch freezers, four cold stores with 15,000-ton capacity — the largest freezing capacity in the Middle East.
excerpt.ar: اثنان من مجمدات IQF، أربعة من مجمدات الدفعات، أربعة مخازن باردة بسعة ١٥٬٠٠٠ طن — أكبر سعة تجميد في الشرق الأوسط.
excerpt.fr: Deux congélateurs IQF, quatre congélateurs par lots, quatre chambres froides de 15 000 tonnes.

body.en:
Montana's vertically integrated facility sits on 50,000 m² of agricultural land 20 km up the Cairo–Alex Agricultural Road in Kalioub. The site processes over 70,000 tonnes of raw material — vegetables and fruits — annually.

At the heart of the operation are two IQF (Individually Quick Frozen) tunnels and four batch freezers, giving Montana the largest and most modern freezing capacity in the Middle East. The IQF process drops the temperature of each piece of produce to -18 °C in minutes, locking in texture, color, and nutrition.

Four cold stores hold 15,000 tonnes total — split between raw material awaiting processing and finished frozen product awaiting export. The storage process is contracted to our sister company Maamoun Cold Stores, which handles fleet, refrigeration, and logistics for the wider Maamoun Brothers Group (founded 1909).

Most agricultural input comes from DACO, another sister company, which supplies the bulk of our raw vegetables and fruits. Packaging is handled by PILCO — a third sister company that produces Montana's custom bags and cartons. This three-company structure means Montana controls the entire chain from soil to shelf.
body.ar: تقع منشأة مونتانا المتكاملة عمودياً على ٥٠٬٠٠٠ متر مربع من الأراضي الزراعية على بعد ٢٠ كم من طريق مصر/الإسكندرية الزراعي في القليوب. يعالج الموقع أكثر من ٧٠٬٠٠٠ طن من المواد الخام سنوياً.
body.fr: L'installation intégrée verticalement de Montana se trouve sur 50 000 m² de terres agricoles à 20 km sur la route agricole Le Caire-Alex à Kalioub. Le site traite plus de 70 000 tonnes de matières premières par an.
